mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seckill_message_log (message_id, message_content, status) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{messageContent}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM seckill_message_log WHERE status = #{status} AND retry_count < #{maxRetry} ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 50
mapper.update: UPDATE seckill_message_log SET status = #{status} WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
UPDATE seckill_message_log SET retry_count = retry_count + 1 WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
UPDATE seckill_message_log SET error_message = #{errorMessage}, status = 2 WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
